platform_decisions.content: Sessions have no persistent identity across restarts; --resume reconstructs from transcript files, not in-memory state
Transcript files are the structural persistence layer outliving sessions
Context compaction is primary mechanism for finite context window management; auto-triggers when full
Context usage observable via header percentage and /context command showing free space and message breakdown
Token usage tracked per-block in transcripts using final values not streaming placeholders
deny rules in settings override any hook permissionDecision including ask, establishing hard permission floors
Human can revoke directory access mid-session with immediate effect
Permission bypass modes protected from silent downgrade
Sandbox failIfUnavailable enforces fail-closed: session exits rather than running unsandboxed
Silent sandbox disable treated as security bug; visible startup warning shown
Credential scrubbing from subprocess environments opt-in via env var
Bash command injection vulnerabilities (backslash-escaped flag bypass, compound command bypass) treated as critical bugs
Managed settings (MDM) override local settings; admin-removed rules take effect without restart
forceRemoteSettingsRefresh blocks startup until remote settings fetched; fails closed on fetch failure
Code review implemented as multi-agent parallel workflow with 4-5 independent agents and confidence scoring
Review confidence threshold (80/100) filters false positives before surfacing issues
PR review decomposed into 6 orthogonal specialist agents with exclusive focus per concern
Feature dev follows 7-phase structured workflow enforcing discovery/exploration before implementation
Security violations in file edits enforced via PreToolUse hook for 9 vulnerability patterns
Hookify enables user-defined behavioral constraints via markdown config without coding
Stop hooks create self-referential feedback loops for iterative improvement without external orchestration
SDK verifier agents run independently from creator agent (separate verification context)
OTEL tracing with W3C TRACEPARENT propagated to Bash subprocesses for distributed traces
Sensitive OTEL attributes opt-in; tool params, prompts, content omitted unless explicitly enabled
Session health via /stats with token usage and cost tracking including subagent usage
Rate limit state observable via status line with used_percentage and resets_at
Background agent failures report partial progress to parent
Hook errors surfaced in transcript with first line of stderr for self-diagnosis
Permission denials in auto mode shown as notification and in /permissions Recent tab
Plugin compatibility enforced via claude plugin validate checking frontmatter and hooks.json
Memory files carry last-modified timestamps enabling staleness reasoning
MEMORY.md index size-limited to 25KB/200 lines preventing unbounded accumulation
Subagents run in isolated git worktrees by default preventing cross-agent file system interference
Agent teams inherit leader permission mode; no permission fragmentation
Subagents inherit MCP tools from dynamically-injected servers
/agents UI exposes Running tab for live subagent state with action controls
Stale worktree cleanup automated for interrupted parallel runs
PostCompact hook fires after compaction for structural reactions to context boundary events
Session titles auto-generated from content (first prompt, plan heading); identity derived from work
CwdChanged and FileChanged hook events enable reactive environment management
TaskCreated hook fires when background task spawned for structural interception
Elicitation hooks enable structural interception of MCP server input requests
Managed settings drop-in directory enables independent policy fragment composition
PermissionDenied hook fires after auto mode denials enabling structural recovery paths
PreToolUse hooks can satisfy AskUserQuestion via updatedInput for headless human-in-the-loop
Plugin hooks restricted to managed sources when allowManagedHooksOnly set
Session quality measurable via feedbackSurveyRate enterprise setting
Auto-compaction circuit breaker stops after 3 failures; prevents infinite retry burning API calls
Skill reminders and system context survive image-attached SDK messages
defer permission decision in PreToolUse pauses headless sessions until --resume re-evaluates
